bug_report.summary: Linked badge Markdown no longer renders as a clickable linked image; shows plain link text instead
steps_to_reproduce: Ensure the pane is in the rendered/preview rendering mode (status bar shows "Rendering: Preview").

Paste each of the following on its own line:
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/zettlr/zettlr)](https://github.com/Zettlr/Zettlr/blob/master/LICENSE)
[![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/zettlr/zettlr?style=social)](https://github.com/Zettlr/Zettlr)
expected_behaviors: Each line renders as a Shields.io badge image (License/Stars) and the badge is clickable, linking to the outer URL.
actual_behaviors: Badges do not render as images; the pane shows textual link content (e.g., “![License]” and “![Stars]” as link text) instead of the badge images.

bug_report.summary: Markdown preview fails to render image with empty alt text; shows literal `![](url)` instead
steps_to_reproduce: Create/open a Markdown document (e.g., “Image Alt Text Edge Cases”).
Open Markdown preview (or ensure the pane is in “Rendering: Preview” mode).
expected_behaviors: The preview should parse the Markdown image syntax and render the image (even with empty alt text).
actual_behaviors: Instead of rendering an image, the preview shows the literal Markdown text `![](https://placehold.co/120x40/png)` (difference region bbox [894,530,1203,578]).

bug_report.summary: Quoted-title Markdown link parses/renders incorrectly and appears to merge with nested-parentheses URL in after-build
steps_to_reproduce: On a new line enter: [Titled](https://example.com "Example Domain")
View the rendered/live preview (Rendering: Preview) in the editor pane.
expected_behaviors: The third link should render as a valid link with text “Titled”, URL https://example.com, and title “Example Domain”.
The earlier “Paren” link should remain intact and not affect subsequent link parsing.
actual_behaviors: After the change, the rendered/inline preview shows malformed output: “Titled” is not rendered as a proper Markdown link and appears to use/merge with the nested-parentheses URL content, indicating broken parsing for quoted-title links and interference between adjacent links.

bug_report.summary: Editor word/character counts differ between builds for the same unchanged document
steps_to_reproduce: Launch Zettlr and reach the main interface.
Open/observe the built-in “Welcome to Zettlr!” document (as shown) and look at the bottom status bar word and character counts.
expected_behaviors: For the same document content, the word and character counts in the status bar should be consistent and not change across builds/runs without edits.
actual_behaviors: The status bar shows different counts between before/after: ~1,573 words & 8,897 characters (before) vs ~1,596 words & 9,023 characters (after) with no visible content changes.
